DECLARATION OF G. EDWARD RUDLOFF, JR IN ANSWER TO OSC RE: DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KARSANT DDS, PETER A  PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IS FOR PLAINTIFF PETER KARSANT, DDS AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS CJ ENVIRONMENTAL, INC., BARRY SCHNEIDER, AND NORMAN SCHNEIDER, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $42,500.00. UPON SATISFACTORY PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TWO CHECKS FOR $10,000.00 AND $1,181.86 TO DEFENDANTS. UPON SATISFACTORY PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT MUTUALLY RELEASE EACH OTHER FOR ALL KNOWN AND UNKNOWN CLAIMS PERTAINING TO THE SUBJECTION MATTER OF THIS ACTION, PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1542. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION PURSUANT TO SECTION 664.6 OF THE CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
